title: How to use a custom HTML template when sending emails
excerpt:
Wondering if anyone knows how to use a custom HTML/CSS template I’ve designed when sending emails to my team via automations and notifications instead of the Monday.com generic template…thanks! 
Spencer

posts.author: everytuesday (Spencer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wondering if anyone knows how to use a custom HTML/CSS template I’ve designed when sending emails to my team via automations and notifications instead of the Monday.com generic template…thanks!

Spencer

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @everytuesday! Thanks for posting about this

HTML is supported in bell notifications within the platform, but not within emails that are sent out as a result of notifications/notification automations.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @everytuesday - This isn’t a fully approved app yet, but there is an HTML email app discussed here in the community you may want to check out: https://community.monday.com/t/re-html-with-email/14906/2

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
